current.description: resume-service: convert standalone parser to microservice

queue.description: contracts: SQL migrations — all service schemas
queue.notes: Additive-only numbered migrations in contracts/migrations/. Schemas: auth.users, auth.organizations, resumes.resumes, resumes.resume_versions, jobs.jobs, jobs.crawled_jobs, applications.applications, applications.application_events, preferences.user_preferences, auth.user_credentials.

queue.description: contracts: Kafka JSON schemas — all topics + DLQs
queue.notes: contracts/kafka/schemas/: raw-jobs.json, classified-jobs.json, match-results.json, application-events.json plus .DLQ variants. JSON Schema draft-07. Include all fields from architecture doc.

queue.description: contracts: gRPC proto — resume-service ↔ jobflow-api
queue.notes: contracts/proto/resume.proto. Service: ResumeService. RPCs: ParseResume(ParseResumeRequest) returns (ParseResumeResponse), GetResume(GetResumeRequest) returns (ResumeDetail). Generate Python stubs.

queue.description: contracts: MCP tool definitions — all 5 tools
queue.notes: contracts/mcp/tools/: generate.json, fetch-job-details.json, fetch-user-resume.json, web-search.json, email-sender.json. MCP JSON Schema format with inputSchema and outputSchema.

queue.description: contracts: A2A agent cards — all 4 specialist agents
queue.notes: contracts/a2a/cards/: research-agent.json, gap-agent.json, critic-agent.json, prep-agent.json. A2A Agent Card spec (Linux Foundation 2026). Include capabilities, inputSchema, outputSchema, skills array.

queue.description: training: data generation — scrape jobs + Claude API synthetic data
queue.notes: training/data_gen.py. Scrape ~500 Calgary + Indeed jobs. Call Claude API to generate: tailored resume variants, cover letters, Q&A pairs per job. Output: Alpaca/Chat JSONL format. Push dataset to HuggingFace Hub.

queue.description: training: fine-tune Gemma 3n E2B — QLoRA on RunPod
queue.notes: training/train.py. Unsloth + TRL + QLoRA. Base: google/gemma-3n-E2B-it. Multi-task: resume tailoring + cover letter + Q&A. Hardware: RunPod A10G x1, ~$10 one-time. training/eval.py: ROUGE-L + human eval on 50-pair held-out set.

queue.description: training: export model — merge LoRA, GGUF Q4_K_M, LiteRT-LM ARM format, push to HuggingFace
queue.notes: training/export.py. Steps: merge LoRA adapters → GGUF Q4_K_M (llama.cpp) → LiteRT-LM conversion (Google LiteRT-LM CLI) → push to brijkpatel/jobflow-gemma3n-e2b on HuggingFace Hub. Tag as v1.0.

queue.description: service: jobflow-llm — LiteRT-LM MCP inference server
queue.notes: services/jobflow-llm/. Python. MCP tool server at /mcp: generate(prompt, max_tokens, temperature) → text. Loads model from HuggingFace Hub on startup via JOBFLOW_MODEL_VERSION env var. Internal only — NetworkPolicy blocks all external. KEDA: MCP request queue depth (min 1, max 8). LangFuse tracing on every generate() call.

queue.description: service: resume-service — parse, embed, store resumes
queue.notes: services/resume-service/. Python + FastAPI. gRPC server (from resume.proto). MCP tool server at /mcp: fetch_user_resume(resume_id). PDF→OCI Object Storage. all-MiniLM-L6-v2 embedding (384-dim, must match classifier). Qdrant: resume_chunks collection. HPA CPU (min 1, max 5). EMBEDDING_MODEL_VERSION env var.

queue.description: service: jobflow-api — public REST API, auth, SSE
queue.notes: services/jobflow-api/. Python + FastAPI. Auth: JWT (python-jose + bcrypt). gRPC client to resume-service. SSE endpoint for real-time application status. HITL approval/reject endpoints → resume A2A task. Application history endpoints. Credential management (Fernet AES-256, key from OCI Vault via ESO). Pre-signed OCI URLs. HPA RPS (min 2, max 10).

queue.description: service: jobflow-web — Next.js dashboard SPA
queue.notes: web/. Next.js TypeScript. Static export → OCI CDN. Pages: resume upload + management, preferences config, application history (list + detail), HITL approval UI (editable cover letter + Q&A, approve/reject). SSE client for real-time updates. No backend logic — REST only.

queue.description: service: jobflow-crawler — job board scraper + dedup
queue.notes: services/jobflow-crawler/. Python + HTTPX + BeautifulSoup. Phase 1: City of Calgary (simple HTML). Dedup: SHA256(domain+job_id) primary, SHA256(normalized_url) fallback. Redis cache loaded from Postgres crawled_jobs at run start, write-through on new jobs. Publishes raw-jobs Kafka topic. K8s CronJob every 30 min, scales to 0 between runs.

queue.description: service: jobflow-classifier — ADK agent, enrich + embed jobs
queue.notes: services/jobflow-classifier/. Python + Google ADK. Consumes raw-jobs Kafka topic. ADK agent calls jobflow-llm via MCP: title normalisation, skills extraction, seniority, job_type. Embeds with all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (same model as resume-service). Stores to Postgres jobs table + Qdrant job_descriptions. MCP tool server at /mcp: fetch_job_details(job_id). Publishes classified-jobs. KEDA: raw-jobs consumer lag (min 0, max 5). EMBEDDING_MODEL_VERSION must match resume-service.

queue.description: service: jobflow-matcher — vector match jobs to resumes
queue.notes: services/jobflow-matcher/. Python + FastAPI. Consumes classified-jobs Kafka topic. Queries Qdrant resume_chunks with job embedding → top-K per user. Score = skill_overlap×0.4 + semantic_sim×0.6. Filters by user preferences (min_score, location, salary_min, job_type, excluded_companies). Creates applications row (status=draft). Publishes match-results. KEDA: classified-jobs consumer lag (min 0, max 5).

queue.description: service: jobflow-research-agent — company intel via web search
queue.notes: services/jobflow-research-agent/. Python + Google ADK. A2A server (exposes research-agent.json card). Input: {company_name, job_url, job_title}. MCP tools: web_search (Brave Search API), scrape_url (HTTPX+BS4), fetch_news. Output: {culture_notes, tech_stack, recent_news, hiring_manager?, red_flags[], glassdoor_rating}. KEDA: A2A task queue (min 0, max 3).

queue.description: service: jobflow-gap-agent — skill gap analysis + apply recommendation
queue.notes: services/jobflow-gap-agent/. Python + Google ADK. A2A server (exposes gap-agent.json card). Input: {job_requirements, user_resume, user_history}. Output: {matched_skills[], gaps[], emphasis_areas[], dealbreakers[], apply_recommendation: yes|no|maybe, reasoning}. apply=no → ApplicationAgent skips entire pipeline. KEDA: A2A task queue (min 0, max 3).

queue.description: service: jobflow-critic-agent — score resume/cover letter, enable reflexion loop
queue.notes: services/jobflow-critic-agent/. Python + Google ADK. A2A server (exposes critic-agent.json card). Input: {content_type: resume|cover_letter, content, job_description, company_context}. Scores on: relevance, personalisation, tone, ATS keyword density, grammar. Output: {score: 0-10, passed: bool, feedback: string[]}. Called twice per application (resume + cover letter). KEDA: A2A task queue (min 0, max 5).

queue.description: service: jobflow-prep-agent — async interview prep PDF generation
queue.notes: services/jobflow-prep-agent/. Python + Google ADK. A2A server (exposes prep-agent.json card). Triggered post-submit (non-blocking). Generates likely interview questions from JD + user background. Generates suggested answers grounded in resume. Stores PDF → OCI Object Storage → publishes application-events{type=prep_ready}. KEDA: A2A task queue (min 0, max 2).

queue.description: service: jobflow-application — ADK orchestrator, full pipeline + HITL
queue.notes: services/jobflow-application/. Python + Google ADK. Consumes match-results Kafka topic. Phase 1 (parallel A2A): ResearchAgent + GapAnalyzerAgent simultaneously. Merge → if apply=no, STOP. Phase 2 (sequential reflexion): tailor_resume → CriticAgent (max 3x) → cover_letter → CriticAgent (max 3x) → qa_answers → build_summary. HITL: checkpoint to Redis adk:checkpoint:{app_id}, webhook to jobflow-api, SSE to web. Post-submit (async): A2A → PrepAgent. MCP: form_filler (Playwright Phase 2). ADK state persisted to Redis (pod-restart safe, 7d TTL). KEDA: match-results lag (min 0, max 5).

queue.description: service: jobflow-notifier — email via Resend, Kafka consumer (Go)
queue.notes: services/jobflow-notifier/. Go. Consumes application-events Kafka topic. Filters by event_type. Email templates: submitted, pending_approval, skipped, prep_ready, failed. Resend API integration. KEDA: application-events Kafka lag (min 0, max 2).

queue.description: infra: Terraform — OKE cluster + OCI resources (Object Storage, Vault, OCIR, DNS)
queue.notes: infrastructure/terraform/. Modules: oke/ (cluster + node pool ARM A1, VPC), object-storage/ (resumes-raw, resumes-tailored buckets), container-registry/ (OCIR), vault/ (OCI Vault for secrets), dns/ (domain + DNS), ingress/ (Nginx + cert-manager). ESO for Vault→K8s Secret sync.

queue.description: infra: Helm charts — shared services (Redpanda, Postgres, Redis, Qdrant, observability)
queue.notes: infrastructure/helm/. Helm values for: Redpanda (Kafka-compat, no ZooKeeper), Postgres (single instance, free tier), Redis, Qdrant. Observability: kube-prometheus-stack, Loki, Tempo, LangFuse. KEDA operator. External Secrets Operator.

queue.description: infra: Helm charts — all 13 application services with KEDA ScaledObjects + NetworkPolicies
queue.notes: Helm chart per service: Deployment, Service, HPA or KEDA ScaledObject (per auto-scaling table in arch doc), NetworkPolicy (per access matrix in arch doc), ExternalSecret refs. jobflow-llm: internal only policy. All images: linux/arm64.

queue.description: infra: CI/CD — GitHub Actions pipelines for all service repos
queue.notes: GitHub Actions workflows. On PR: lint + test (pytest/go test). On merge to main: docker build --platform linux/arm64 --push → OCIR, helm upgrade --install in OKE, smoke test (health endpoints). Self-hosted runner on Oracle Ampere A1 — native ARM64 builds, no QEMU.

queue.description: testing: integration tests — full pipeline with mocked LLM
queue.notes: Full pipeline test: crawl a fake job → classify → match against test resume → application pipeline (LLM mocked). Verify: Kafka message flow, Postgres state transitions, Qdrant writes, Redis checkpoint, HITL flow (approve + reject paths). Run in docker-compose local environment.

queue.description: testing: E2E smoke test + load test on staging
queue.notes: Smoke: health endpoint checks for all services on OKE staging. Single real job through full pipeline. Load: k6 — 100 concurrent applications, verify KEDA auto-scaling fires correctly, check Grafana dashboards (Kafka lag, LLM queue, application funnel).

queue.description: Write contract artifacts (proto + Kafka schema + MCP tool + SQL migration + impact-map update + architecture.md Kafka row)
Expand domain models — ResumeData + ResumeChunk (no embedding) + all domain interfaces including IEmbeddingClient + IFileStorage
Restructure into domain/application/infrastructure/api layers — move existing code, delete standalone artifacts, move sample_resumes to tests/fixtures, add composition root skeleton
Replace Gemini with JobflowLLMClient — BatchedLLMExtractor + ILLMClient + config factory + MAX_LLM_INPUT_CHARS truncation + NER 2000-char guard
Add JobflowEmbeddingClient — embed_batch batched MCP call + startup dim-check
Add PostgresResumeRepository — asyncpg save + get_by_id + get_latest_by_user
Add QdrantVectorRepository — upsert ResumeChunkVector + reconstruct section data for GetResume
Add Kafka publisher — resume-parsed event with tenant_id
Add OCI storage client — fetch object by path
Add gRPC API layer — ParseResume + GetResume + GetLatestResume servicer, generated stubs from proto
Add MCP tool server — fetch_user_resume via FastMCP on MCP_PORT with X-Internal-Token auth, trimmed response shape

Update all tests — path changes + new field coverage + mock ILLMClient + mock IEmbeddingClient + MCP auth tests + Kafka publish verification
Wire main.py composition root — start gRPC + MCP + health servers with all adapters
